title: Blue Skies And Fluffy White Clouds
description: Ground yourself with this body spray of woody olibanum and earthy patchouli. Soon it will all be Blue Skies And Fluffy White Clouds.
ingredients: Cinnamomum Zeylanicum Leaf Oil (Cinnamon Leaf Oil)

images.alt: A recycled black plastic LUSH body spray bottle with a trigger nozzle stands upright with a blue rimmed label with white text that reads "Blue Skies and Fluffy White Clouds Body Spray".

The image shows a recycled black plastic LUSH spray bottle of "Blue Skies and Fluffy White Clouds" sitting on a pile of books on a light blue bedside table. A matching lamp, alarm clock, and glasses sit nearby, next to a blue bed and wall.

The image shows a light-toned hand spraying a bottle of LUSH 'Blue Skies and Fluffy White Clouds' body spray. A warm-toned hand is cupped below, catching the fine mist against a bright, sky-blue background.

The image shows a bottle of LUSH 'Blue Skies and Fluffy White Clouds' body spray on a glass shelf. A teal towel hangs below, with a blue cup and brushes nearby, against a bright, tiled, sky-blue bathroom wall.
